package rulecoverage

func PositiveValidationLogicDuplicatedAcrossHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "validation_logic_duplicated_across_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated required-field or enum-validation blocks across multiple handler files."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
